content:
🚀 portabase | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Simplifying and automating the backup and restoration of multiple database types for self-hosted environments.
✨ Key Features: • Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, MsSQL, MariaDB, Firebird SQL, SQLite, MongoDB, Redis, and Valkey • Automated CLI, Docker, Docker Compose, and Kubernetes (Helm) installation • Integrates with Portabase agents for secure operations • Self-hosted and open-source • Provides a dashboard for managing backups
📖 Summary: Portabase is a self-hosted, open-source tool designed to simplify database backup and restoration across a wide range of popular database systems. It leverages secure agents for operations and offers multiple installation methods including CLI, Docker, and Kubernetes.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
